name: Ivanti ITSM Administrator
summary: Owns configuration, forms, business objects, workflows, notifications, saved searches, dashboards, and operational support in Ivanti ITSM.
responsibilities: Configure business objects, layouts, fields, relationships, and validation rules.
Manage workflows, quick actions, saved searches, escalations, and email templates.
Support reporting, dashboards, user access, service request design, and production troubleshooting.

name: Ivanti ITSM Developer
summary: Builds advanced automation, integrations, scripting solutions, API connections, and complex platform customizations.
responsibilities: Develop integrations using REST APIs, web services, scripts, and automation logic.
Implement reusable components for forms, validations, data handling, and process orchestration.
Support deployment, troubleshooting, optimization, and technical design reviews.

name: Ivanti UEM Engineer
summary: Designs and supports unified endpoint management, patching, distribution, policy compliance, and device lifecycle processes.
responsibilities: Manage endpoint policies, software deployment, patching, compliance, and inventory visibility.
Coordinate device onboarding, lifecycle, and policy-driven controls across managed environments.
Investigate patch failures, agent communication issues, and deployment health.

name: Ivanti MDM Engineer
summary: Focuses on mobile device enrollment, policy enforcement, app deployment, compliance monitoring, and security controls.
responsibilities: Configure device enrollment, ownership profiles, compliance rules, and app delivery flows.
Support BYOD and corporate-owned device management with policy governance.
Handle mobile access, security baselines, and app lifecycle operations.

name: Ivanti Velocity Consultant
summary: Implements mobile workflows for warehouse, field, and business-critical environments using browser and scanning-based experiences.
responsibilities: Design browser-based and mobile-enabled task flows for frontline operations.
Map business workflows into handheld or kiosk experiences.
Support scanning, navigation, operational productivity, and usability improvements.

name: Ivanti Integration and Automation Architect
summary: Designs cross-product automation, governance, integration strategy, API security, and scalable solution patterns across the Ivanti ecosystem.
responsibilities: Define integration patterns across ITSM, endpoint, identity, and external enterprise systems.
Guide automation strategy, reusable services, and error handling patterns.
Align solution design to operational needs, performance, and maintainability.
